nodes.name: Bio-Surge
nodes.effect: +1 movement for all Vorax infantry units

nodes.name: Spore Proliferation
nodes.effect: Spore Grenade blast radius +1 hex, duration +1 cycle

nodes.name: Acid Immunity
nodes.effect: Vorax units immune to friendly acid weapon splash damage

nodes.name: Chitinous Evolution
nodes.effect: All Vorax armor values +1 globally. Carapace armor +3 instead.
nodes.notes: The hive adapts to every threat it faces

nodes.name: Synapse Expansion
nodes.notes: Every mind connected is another weapon

nodes.name: Regeneration Protocol
nodes.effect: All Vorax ground units heal 1 HP per cycle if not in active combat
nodes.notes: The swarm cannot be worn down

nodes.name: Hive Awareness
nodes.effect: All Vorax units on this planet share vision — no fog of war

nodes.name: Omega Spore
nodes.effect: Unlock: Omega Spore ability — target planet hex, all enemy units take 2 damage next cycle. 3 cycle cooldown.
nodes.notes: The sky itself becomes a weapon

nodes.name: Bio-Titan Efficiency
nodes.notes: The largest specimens grow for free

nodes.name: The Great Devouring
nodes.effect: When a Vorax unit destroys an enemy unit, gain +1 scrap immediately
nodes.notes: Every kill feeds the next assault

nodes.name: Tendril Advance
nodes.effect: Vorax units gain +1 to all invasion rolls. Adjacent territory absorption costs -2 scrap.

nodes.name: Full Consumption
nodes.effect: Unlock: once per game, a fully consumed planet yields +30 scrap and all Vorax units on it fully heal
